name: HRQ_CATEGORIES_VL
query: SELECT B.BUSINESS_GROUP_ID, B.CATEGORY_ID, L.NAME, B.PARENT_CATEGORY_ID, B.SUBSCRIBER_ID, B.CONTAIN_QUESTIONS, B.CONTAIN_QUESTIONNAIRES, B.MODULE_ID, B.OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER, B.CREATED_BY, B.CREATION_DATE, B.LAST_UPDATED_BY, B.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, B.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN FROM HRQ_CATEGORIES_B B, HRQ_CATEGORIES_TL L WHERE B.BUSINESS_GROUP_ID = L.BUSINESS_GROUP_ID AND B.CATEGORY_ID = L.CATEGORY_ID AND L.LANGUAGE = USERENV('LANG')
